title: Simple Voice Chat Group Player Names
description: A mod that displays player names next to their heads in voice chat groups
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c44eb90dddc9b1c743464597661166528740198.png)
# VoiceChat Player Names

VoiceChat Player Names displays the names of players next to their heads while they are in your Simple Voice Chat group.
It is highly customizable and integrates with ModMenu to make all settings easy to view and adjust.

### Example
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce18c815311e4cf4ead834c3eded0a8bd956fd2d.png)

# Features
- Shows player names above their heads when in a voice chat group
- Clean integration with ModMenu for visual settings
- Lightweight and compatible with most other mods

# Dependencies
Make sure you have the following installed:
- ModMenu
- Cloth Config API
- Simple Voice Chat
